headline: Ethisphere Names Henry Schein as One of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® for 15th Consecutive Year
summary: MELVILLE, N.Y., March 18, 2026--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world’s largest provider of healthcare solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, has been recognized as one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.
